title: Moonbeam Chain - Open App
meta_description: moonbeam chain app directory: open GLMR dApps, official docs, wallet setup, and network explorers from the Moonbeam ecosystem.
hero_h2: Explore the GLMR network and its EVM dApps
hero_lead: moonbeam chain connects users to Moonbeam's EVM-compatible GLMR network, official app directory, wallet setup, docs, and explorers in one app-first route.
what_is: Moonbeam is an EVM-compatible GLMR network in the Polkadot ecosystem, built for smart contracts, dApps, and cross-chain integrations. The official app directory is the direct place to explore live Moonbeam applications.

how.d: Use the app button and confirm the domain is apps.moonbeam.network before connecting a wallet.
Use MetaMask or another compatible Ethereum wallet and switch to Moonbeam mainnet when prompted.
Browse DeFi, NFT, gaming, infrastructure, and tooling apps from the Moonbeam directory.
Check the app, contract, token, and network details before approving any transaction.

points.p: Moonbeam supports familiar EVM wallets and developer tooling, while using GLMR for transaction fees and network operations.
The network is designed around interoperability, with Moonbeam docs covering XCM, GMP, and integrations for multi-chain applications.
Use Moonbeam Docs for chain ID, RPC endpoints, wallet setup, and explorer references.

faq.q: What is moonbeam chain used for?
faq.a: It is used for EVM-compatible smart contracts and dApps across DeFi, NFTs, gaming, infrastructure, and cross-chain use cases in the Moonbeam ecosystem.

faq.q: Is moonbeam chain the same as Moonbeam Network?
faq.a: Yes. Searchers commonly use that phrase for Moonbeam Network, the GLMR mainnet in the Polkadot ecosystem.

faq.q: How do I add moonbeam chain to MetaMask?
faq.a: Use the official app or Moonbeam network docs; the documented mainnet chain ID is 1284.

faq.q: Where can I explore moonbeam chain transactions?
faq.a: Use Moonscan to search addresses, transactions, blocks, tokens, NFTs, and verified contracts on Moonbeam.

faq.q: Do I need GLMR on moonbeam chain?
faq.a: Typically yes for gas when sending transactions or interacting with contracts; individual dApps may require other assets depending on the action.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify the destination domain before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
